description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image globally and a docker:dind service, with DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/. Define stages build and publish. Add a build_binary job in the build stage that uses the golang:1.10 image, runs `make gitlab-init`, then changes directory to /go/src/gitlab.com/fenrirunbound/pipeline-queue and runs `make install vendor build`, then runs `make gitlab-archive`, and stores the resulting files as artifacts in the artifacts/ path. Add a build_image job in the build stage that runs `docker info` and `apk add make` in before_script, then executes `make docker` to build a Docker image. Add a publish_image job in the publish stage that runs `apk add make` in before_script, is limited to the master branch of fenrirunbound/pipeline-queue, and runs `make docker-publish` to push the built image to the registry.
